item.name: Zodiark Idol
item.description:
When you ask your mother if you can have Zodiark, but she says you already have Zodiark at home.

Use item to acquire the Zodiark idol minion.
item.tooltip:
For the glory of Lord Zodiark.
   - Igeyorhm
item.specialactiondescription:
Binds all enemies within range.
Duration: 5s
